name: Noam Shazeer
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Co-invented multi-head attention, a core mechanism of the Transformer
Pioneered Mixture of Experts approaches at Google (Switch Transformer, 2021)
Co-founded Character.AI in 2021, building large language models for interactive AI characters
Returned to Google in 2024 as part of Character.AI deal
summary: Noam Shazeer is one of the most prolific and inventive researchers in modern AI. As a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need,' he helped create the Transformer architecture that underpins every frontier model. His contributions to multi-head attention and Mixture of Experts architectures have been particularly influential. After leaving Google, he co-founded Character.AI, which became one of the most popular consumer AI applications before he returned to Google in 2024.
